loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing this month's active and reactive energy totals — per-phase energy isn't measured for this asset; subsidy and progress targets are not configured.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive power trends — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; rated and contracted power lines are omitted as nameplate data is unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and derived energy loss — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; lossPct used as deltaPct proxy.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing active power load trend and load factor — specific anomaly counts are derived from the AI summary as no dedicated event-count columns are logged for this meter.
